title: Invisible Item Frames
description: Adds craftable invisible item frames with seamless, native vanilla integration.
body:
# InvisibleItemFramesLite > Forked from [InvisibleItemFrames](https://github.com/tiffany352/InvisibleItemFrames) by [Tiffany Bennett (Tiffnix)](https://tiffnix.com/contact). A fast, minimal Paper plugin that adds **craftable invisible item frames** to your server; no configuration required, no commands or permissions, just drop it in and go. See a [video demo](https://youtu.be/2kLfRHyH5cc), and the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/plugin/invisibleitemframes/gallery).
Item Frame Demo Crafting Recipe

This crafting recipe is configurable!
## Why This Version? InvisibleItemFramesLite is the fastest, most performant invisible item frame plugin available. - Lightweight performance; it's tiny, fast, and focused - Works right out of the box; no additional configuration is needed - Compatibility with newer Paper versions (26.1+) - Plenty of bug fixes ## Features - Adds invisible item frames you can craft and place like normal - Frames are visible when empty, and automatically turn invisible once an item is added - Allows for container pass-through (you an still sneak to rotate items) - Perfect for clean builds, displays, or shops without visual clutter No command trees. No permission spaghetti. Just craftable invisible item frames that feel like they could've been shipped natively with vanilla. ## Migrating from v2 to v3 Server admins are expected to update their configuration to replace any legacy chat formatting with Adventure's MiniMessage formatting: https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format. Alternatively, if you wish, you may simply delete the config file and a fresh one will automatically be generated on the next server restart. ## bStats Metrics
